paragraphs: AI-Integrated Java Full Stack Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable microservices and cloud-native applications using Java, Spring Boot, and React, with hands-on experience integrating AI/LLM capabilities into production systems using AWS Bedrock and OpenAI APIs for features such as automated document analysis, data extraction, and workflow automation; strong expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka, and cloud deployments on AWS (EKS, Lambda, S3), with a proven track record of developing high-performance applications handling millions of transactions with secure authentication (OAuth2, JWT), CI/CD automation, and containerized deployments.
